news.t: Asset Allocation Summit: Opportunities in Direxion's Leveraged-Inverse Suite
Your Stock Portfolio Has Too Much Tech. Consider These 12 ETFs.
10 Nasdaq-100 ETFs and Mutual Funds to Buy

holdings.infoBox: QQQE is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marvell Technology stock at 2.62%, Arm Holdings at 2.37%, Intel at 2.34%, Advanced Micro Devices at 2.10%, and Micron Technology at 1.91%.

overview.description: The Direxion NASDAQ-100 Equal Weighted Index ETF (QQQE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ-100 Equally Weighted index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted version of the NASDAQ 100. QQQE was launched on Mar 21, 2012 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: 10 Nasdaq-100 ETFs and Mutual Funds to Buy
data.text: Forget the S&P 500 and even the Dow Jones Industrial Average. The big name in big-name indices – at least in the past few years – is the Nasdaq-100.
